content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Plant". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/185/A
content.inputFormat: The input consists of multiple test cases. Each test case contains an integer N, followed by N integers representing the growth rates of the plants.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output the number of days it takes for all plants to grow to the same height.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed
hidden.expectedOutput: Error: Growth rate cannot be zero or negative

solution.approach: Simulate the growth of each plant and check when all plants have the same height.

code.Python3:
import sys
T = int(input())
for _ in range(T):
    N = int(input())
    plants = list(map(int, input().split()))
    max_height = max(plants)
    days = 0
    while True:
        all_same = 1
        for i in range(N):
            if plants[i] != max_height:
                all_same = 0
                plants[i] += 1
        if all_same:
            break
        days += 1
    print(days)
